title: Godot parity slice (mirrors demo-vertical-slice)
description: Same player-visible behaviors as demo-vertical-slice but Godot proofs. Traceability: node titles align with demo-vertical-slice.workflow.json. Oracle until M6: Unity slice; after archive, Godot tests are canonical. Shipping filenames, autosave, migration, export: sibling workflow godot-steam-build.

nodes.title: Main scene map bootstraps at tour
nodes.description: Parity: demo-main-map-bootstraps-tour. Given New Game, when hub loads, GameState.current_location_id is tour. Proof: manual + tests/test_game_state.gd.

nodes.title: Tour location lists Fair Field as next
nodes.description: Parity: demo-map-graph-tour-to-fayre-felde. Hub exposes Fair Field travel (data id fayre_felde). Proof: hub_map.gd + locations data resource.

nodes.title: Fair Field encounter wired to False
nodes.description: Parity: demo-fayre-felde-encounter-wired. EncounterDef enemy_id false; combat uses EncounterDef. Proof: data/encounter_fair_field.tres + combat_manager.gd.

nodes.title: Save checkpoint updates current location
nodes.description: Parity: demo-checkpoint-updates-location. SaveService.save_progress updates location_id. Proof: tests/run_headless_tests.gd save section.

nodes.title: Game progress persistence roundtrip
nodes.description: Parity: demo-progress-json-roundtrip. ConfigFile save/load fields match. Proof: run_headless_tests.gd.

nodes.title: Pause overlay present after bootstrap
nodes.description: Parity: demo-pause-overlay-present. Combat scene PauseLayer; Escape toggles. Proof: manual + combat.tscn.

nodes.title: Settings master volume persists
nodes.description: Parity: demo-settings-volume-persists. SaveService settings cfg. Proof: run_headless_tests.gd settings section.

nodes.title: Continue when save exists
nodes.description: Parity: demo-continue-available-when-save-exists. has_save gates Continue. Proof: manual + run_headless_tests.gd.

nodes.title: Combat win Continue returns to map (manual)
nodes.description: Parity: demo-slice-combat-victory-to-map-manual. Victory → hub; location updated. Proof: STEAM_BUILD.md QA + manual.
